mapper.select: SELECT image_uuid, img_feature_order as featureOrder FROM image_info
mapper.update:
UPDATE image_info
IMAGE_HASH_CODE = #{imageHashCode},
IMG_FEATURE_VALUE = #{imgFeatureValue,jdbcType=BLOB},
IMG_FEATURE_ORDER = #{imgFeatureOrder},
where image_uuid = #{imageUuid}
mapper.select: SELECT image_uuid, image_original_name, image_url, img_feature_value as image_hash_code FROM image_info
SELECT * FROM (SELECT image_uuid, img_feature_order as featureOrder, img_feature_value as imgFeatureValue FROM image_info order by image_id desc) WHERE ROWNUM < 20
